questions.question: Describe the difference between the fork and vfork system calls. Provide an example to illustrate the difference.
questions.hint: Explain the effect of the parent and child processes.

questions.question: What is the purpose of the wait3 system call? How is it different from the wait system call?
questions.hint: Provide examples to support your answer.

questions.question: Explain the difference between the exit and exit status system calls. When would you use each?
questions.hint: Provide a scenario to illustrate the use of each system call.
